# netbox_tag (Data Source)

Fetches a single tag from Netbox by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Fetch a single tag by ID.
data "netbox_tag" "example" {
  id = 1
}

output "tag_name" {
  value = data.netbox_tag.example.name
}

output "tag_color" {
  value = data.netbox_tag.example.color
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) The numeric ID of the tag.

### Read-Only

- `color` (String) The color of the tag as a 6-digit hex code.
- `description` (String) Description for the tag.
- `name` (String) The name of the tag.
- `slug` (String) URL-friendly unique shorthand for the tag.
